'''hayana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilmonger|oilmonger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilmonger|oilmonger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hayana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæyænæth|hæyænæth]] || [[word:hæyænæj|hæyænæj]] || [[word:hæyænæsh|hæyænæsh]] || [[word:hæyænæ|hæyænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayayanath|hayayanath]] || [[word:hayayanaj|hayayanaj]] || [[word:hayayanash|hayayanash]] || [[word:hayayana|hayayana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayanath|hayanath]] || [[word:hayanaj|hayanaj]] || [[word:hayanash|hayanash]] || [[word:hayana|hayana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayafnath|hayafnath]] || [[word:hayafnaj|hayafnaj]] || [[word:hayafnash|hayafnash]] || [[word:hayafnaf|hayafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hayanatha|hayanatha]] || [[word:hayanaja|hayanaja]] || [[word:hayanasha|hayanasha]] || [[word:hayanaka|hayanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hayanath|hayanath]] || [[word:hayanaj|hayanaj]] || [[word:hayanash|hayanash]] || [[word:hayana|hayana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hayanathal|hayanathal]] || [[word:hayanajal|hayanajal]] || [[word:hayanashal|hayanashal]] || [[word:hayanakal|hayanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hayanathatha|hayanathatha]] || [[word:hayanajaja|hayanajaja]] || [[word:hayanashasha|hayanashasha]] || [[word:hayanaka|hayanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hayanathan|hayanathan]] || [[word:hayanajan|hayanajan]] || [[word:hayanashan|hayanashan]] || [[word:hayanakan|hayanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hayanathaoro|hayanathaoro]] || [[word:hayanajaoro|hayanajaoro]] || [[word:hayanashaoro|hayanashaoro]] || [[word:hayanakaoro|hayanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
